headline: Veralto Announces Pricing of Senior Notes Offering
summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO) ("Veralto") announced today that it has priced an offering of $725,000,000 of 4.850% senior notes due 2032 (the "notes") at an offering price of 99.996% of the principal amount (the "Offering").
